title: 400 coined IR terms — 30 shortlist — 20 canon — 10 mini-theories
public_claim: Foreign Affairs Lexicon is a method packet moving 400 coined IR terms through shortlist, canon, and mini-theory stages.
distinctive_mechanism: It narrows 400 terms to a 30-term shortlist, a 20-term canon, and 10 mini-theories, including Credibility Underwriting Gap, Ambiguity Rent, Sanction Saturation, Standards Entrenchment, Compellence Overdraft, Compliance Chokepoints, and Doctrine Lock-In.
use_value: It matters because conceptual innovation becomes useful only when terms are promoted through criteria, examples, adoption logic, and mini-theory work rather than clever naming alone.

claim_ceiling: The page may claim proof-structured components and visible verification targets. It may not claim external validation, production deployment, or completed empirical findings unless the project-specific record states those facts.
